unchangedJobs.title: Customer Service Specialist Jewellery
unchangedJobs.description:
The Customer Service Specialist Jewellery is responsible for executing and coordinating customer service activities in the wholesale direct markets, especially the Italian one, in order to provide Guess partners with all necessary tools and information to perform their daily tasks. He/she could also assist customer service activities for other markets, within the wholesale channel.

CORE JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

Sales campaign

Post sales campaign

## Requirements
- Experience: at least 3 years’ experience in similar field
- AS400 or Stealth experience is mandatory
- Education: University Degree
- Excellent knowledge of written and spoken English is mandatory. Any other European language is considered as a plus
- PC Skills: expert in Excel, strong experience in using analytical systems
- Proactively works towards set goals and has a problem solving mind-set
- Excellent execution, high respect of deadlines and strong organizational skills
- Open-minded and a good team player, ability to manage stressful situations

## Benefits
- An International, fresh and dynamic working environment
- Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Community
- Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities!
- Training & Development platform and paths
- Discount on our products both online and in stores

unchangedJobs.title: E-Commerce Senior Merchandiser
unchangedJobs.description:
Reporting directly to the Head of E-commerce, the E-Commerce Senior Merchandiserwill own the end-to-end product lifecycle by translating market insights into compelling assortments that drive sales and brand growth.

Collaborate cross-functionally to ensure the right product is in the right place at the right time, maximizing customer impact and business performance.

CORE JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

Product Presentation & Onsite Strategy

Campaign Optimization

Cross-Functional Collaboration

## Requirements
- Master’s degree in Business Management, Marketing or Communications
- Strong understanding of campaign workflows and execution
- Ecommerce merchandising & category performance management
- Ability to manage Salesforce tools and search tools as a nice to have
- Ability to analyse daily and weekly sales, stock levels, sell-through and margin by category, collection and campaign, nice to have a Microstrategy background
- Product content optimization and analytics-driven decision making
- Excellent organizational and time management skills, with the ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously are key
- Excellent communication and problem-solving skills
- Previous experience in managing junior resources is required
- Strong attention to details and ability to work in a fast-paced environment
- Fluent English is required; additional languages are considered a plus
- Results-oriented, proactive, and execution-focused, with a strong sense of ownership
- Strong interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively across multicultural and cross-functional teams
- Positive attitude, collaborative team player, and able to work independently when required

## Benefits
- An International, fresh and dynamic working environment
- Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Community
- Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities!
- Training & Development platform and paths
- Discount on our products both online and in stores

descriptionByLocale.it: Alle dirette dipendenze del responsabile dell'e-commerce, il Merchandiser senior dell'e-commerce si occuperà del ciclo di vita del prodotto end-to-end, traducendo le intuizioni del mercato in assortimenti interessanti che favoriscono le vendite e la crescita del marchio. Collaborerà a livello interfunzionale per garantire che il prodotto giusto sia nel posto giusto al momento giusto, massimizzando l'impatto sui clienti e le performance aziendali. CORE JOB RESPONSIBILITIES Product Presentation & Onsite Strategy Campaign Optimization Cross-Functional Collaboration ## Requirements - Master in Business Management, Marketing o Comunicazione - Forte comprensione dei flussi di lavoro e dell'esecuzione delle campagne - Ecommerce merchandising & category performance management - Capacità di gestire strumenti Salesforce e di ricerca come nice to have - Capacità di analizzare le vendite giornaliere e settimanali, i livelli di stock, il sell-through e il margine per categoria, Ottime capacità organizzative e di gestione del tempo, con la capacità di gestire più progetti contemporaneamente - Ottime capacità di comunicazione e di problem-solving - È richiesta una precedente esperienza nella gestione di risorse junior - Forte attenzione ai dettagli e capacità di lavorare in un ambiente con ritmi elevati - È richiesto un inglese fluente; Altre lingue sono considerate un plus - Orientamento ai risultati, proattività e orientamento all'esecuzione, con un forte senso di responsabilità - Spiccate capacità interpersonali e di comunicazione, con l'abilità di collaborare efficacemente in team multiculturali e interfunzionali - Atteggiamento positivo, team player collaborativo e in grado di lavorare in modo indipendente quando richiesto ## Benefici - Un ambiente di lavoro internazionale, fresco e dinamico - Programmi di salute fisica e mentale, progetti sostenibili e workshop promossi da Guess Community - Arte, sport ed eventi sociali al di fuori dell'ufficio, grazie alle nostre attività Guess Fun! - Piattaforma e percorsi di formazione e sviluppo - Sconti sui nostri prodotti sia online che nei negozi
descriptionByLocale.de: Der E-Commerce Senior Merchandiser berichtet direkt an den Leiter E-Commerce und ist für den End-to-End-Produktlebenszyklus verantwortlich, indem er Markteinblicke in überzeugende Sortimente umsetzt, die den Umsatz und das Markenwachstum vorantreiben. Arbeiten Sie funktionsübergreifend zusammen, um sicherzustellen, dass das richtige Produkt zur richtigen Zeit am richtigen Ort ist, und maximieren Sie so die Kundenwirkung und die Geschäftsleistung. KERNJOBVERANTWORTLICHKEITEN: Produktpräsentation und Vor-Ort-Strategie, Kampagnenoptimierung, funktionsübergreifende Zusammenarbeit ## Anforderungen – Master-Abschluss in Betriebswirtschaft, Marketing oder Kommunikation – ausgeprägtes Verständnis von Kampagnenabläufen und -ausführung – E-Commerce-Merchandising und Kategorie-Performance-Management – Fähigkeit, Salesforce-Tools und Suchtools als „nice to have“ zu verwalten – Fähigkeit, tägliche und wöchentliche Verkäufe, Lagerbestände, Durchverkauf und Marge nach Kategorie, Kollektion und Kampagne zu analysieren, schön, einen Mikrostrategie-Hintergrund zu haben – Produktinhaltsoptimierung und analysegesteuerte Entscheidungsfindung - Hervorragende Organisations- und Zeitmanagementfähigkeiten sowie die Fähigkeit, mehrere Projekte gleichzeitig zu verwalten, sind von entscheidender Bedeutung - Hervorragende Kommunikations- und Problemlösungsfähigkeiten - Vorkenntnisse in der Verwaltung von Nachwuchsressourcen sind erforderlich - Starke Liebe zum Detail und Fähigkeit, in einem schnelllebigen Umfeld zu arbeiten - Fließendes Englisch ist erforderlich; zusätzliche Sprachen werden als Pluspunkt angesehen - Ergebnisorientiert, proaktiv und ausführungsorientiert, mit einem starken Gefühl der Eigenverantwortung - Starke zwischenmenschliche und kommunikative Fähigkeiten mit der Fähigkeit, effektiv in multikulturellen und funktionsübergreifenden Teams zusammenzuarbeiten - Positive Einstellung, kollaborativer Teamplayer und die Fähigkeit, bei Bedarf unabhängig zu arbeiten ## Vorteile - Ein internationales, frisches und dynamisches Arbeitsumfeld - Programme für körperliche und geistige Gesundheit, nachhaltige Projekte und Workshops, die von der Guess Community gefördert werden - Kunst-, Sport- und gesellschaftliche Veranstaltungen außerhalb des Büros, dank unserer Guess Fun-Aktivitäten! - Schulungs- und Entwicklungsplattform und -pfade - Rabatt auf unsere Produkte sowohl online als auch in Geschäften
descriptionByLocale.fr: Relevant directement du responsable du commerce électronique, le marchandiseur principal du commerce électronique sera responsable du cycle de vie des produits de bout en bout en traduisant les connaissances du marché en assortiments convaincants qui stimulent les ventes et la croissance de la marque. Collaborez de manière interfonctionnelle pour garantir que le bon produit est au bon endroit et au bon moment, maximisant ainsi l'impact sur les clients et les performances de l'entreprise. RESPONSABILITÉS PRINCIPALES DU POSTE Présentation du produit et stratégie sur site Optimisation des campagnes Collaboration interfonctionnelle ## Exigences - Master en gestion d'entreprise, marketing ou communication - Forte compréhension des flux de travail et de l'exécution des campagnes - Merchandising du commerce électronique et gestion des performances des catégories - Capacité à gérer les outils Salesforce et les outils de recherche comme un atout - Capacité à analyser les ventes quotidiennes et hebdomadaires, les niveaux de stock, les ventes et la marge par catégorie, collection et campagne, agréable d'avoir une expérience en microstratégie - Optimisation du contenu des produits et Prise de décision basée sur l'analyse - D'excellentes compétences en organisation et en gestion du temps, avec la capacité de gérer plusieurs projets simultanément sont essentielles - Excellentes compétences en communication et en résolution de problèmes - Une expérience antérieure dans la gestion de ressources juniors est requise - Une grande attention aux détails et la capacité de travailler dans un environnement en évolution rapide - Un anglais courant est requis ; des langues supplémentaires sont considérées comme un plus - Orienté vers les résultats, proactif et axé sur l'exécution, avec un fort sentiment d'appartenance - Solides compétences interpersonnelles et de communication, avec la capacité de collaborer efficacement au sein d'équipes multiculturelles et interfonctionnelles - Attitude positive, esprit d'équipe collaboratif et capacité de travailler de manière indépendante si nécessaire ## Avantages - Un environnement de travail international, frais et dynamique - Programmes de santé physique et mentale, projets et ateliers durables promus par la communauté Guess - Arts, sports et événements sociaux en dehors du bureau, grâce à nos activités Guess Fun ! - Plateforme et parcours de formation et de développement - Remise sur nos produits en ligne et en magasin

unchangedJobs.title: Key Account & Marketplace Manager (Amazon & North America)
unchangedJobs.description:
The Key Account & Marketplace Manager (Amazon and North America) drives profitable brand growth on Amazon as both Vendor (1P) and Marketplace Seller (3P), while shaping marketplace strategy in North America. This role manages commercial performance, supports Amazon P&L, and ensures operational excellence, brand consistency, and sustained growth through coordination with Amazon, Marketplace NA, partners, and internal teams.

P&L and Business Management

Amazon Vendor & Seller Operations Management

Merchandising and Marketing Management

Reporting and Analytics

Additional Responsibilities Carry out additional tasks and projects as assigned in line with business needs.

## Requirements
- Relevant experience of more than 7/8 years in the field
- Previous experience in ecommerce roles with direct involvement in Amazon marketplace management (Vendor Central and/or Seller Central)
- Strong understanding of Amazon operations, merchandising and performance drivers
- Solid analytical skills with ability to interpret data and KPIs
- Expertise working with Excel for Data Analysis
- Strong commercial mindset with negotiation and stakeholder management skills
- Experience working with external agencies and cross-functional teams
- Good organizational and project management skills
- Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment
- Strong communication and stakeholder management skills
- Fluent in English; additional languages are a plus

## Benefits
- Balance between work and personal life: Smart Working (Hybrid work model) and Time flexibility
- An International, fresh and dynamic working environment
- Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Community
- Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities!
- Training & Development platform and paths
- Discount on our products both online and in stores

descriptionByLocale.en:
The Key Account & Marketplace Manager (Amazon and North America) drives profitable brand growth on Amazon as both Vendor (1P) and Marketplace Seller (3P), while shaping marketplace strategy in North America. This role manages commercial performance, supports Amazon P&L, and ensures operational excellence, brand consistency, and sustained growth through coordination with Amazon, Marketplace NA, partners, and internal teams.

P&L and Business Management

Amazon Vendor & Seller Operations Management

Merchandising and Marketing Management

Reporting and Analytics

Additional Responsibilities Carry out additional tasks and projects as assigned in line with business needs.

## Requirements

- Strong understanding of Amazon operations, merchandising and performance drivers

- Expertise working with Excel for Data Analysis

- Experience working with external agencies and cross-functional teams
- Good organizational and project management skills
- Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment
- Strong communication and stakeholder management skills
- Fluent in English; additional languages are a plus

## Benefits
- Balance between work and personal life: Smart Working (Hybrid work model) and Time flexibility
- An International, fresh and dynamic working environment
- Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Community
- Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities!
- Training & Development platform and paths
- Discount on our products both online and in stores
descriptionByLocale.it: Il Key Account & Marketplace Manager (Amazon e Nord America) guida la crescita proficua del marchio su Amazon sia come venditore (1P) che come venditore del Marketplace (3P), dando forma alla strategia del marketplace in Nord America. Questo ruolo gestisce le performance commerciali, supporta il P&L di Amazon e garantisce l'eccellenza operativa, la coerenza del marchio e la crescita sostenuta attraverso il coordinamento con Amazon, Marketplace NA, i partner e i team interni. Gestione del P&L e del business Gestione delle operazioni di Amazon Vendor & Seller Gestione del Merchandising e del Marketing Reporting e Analytics Responsabilità aggiuntive Svolgere ulteriori compiti e progetti come assegnato in linea con le esigenze aziendali. ## Requisiti - Esperienza rilevante di oltre 7/8 anni nel settore - Esperienza precedente in ruoli di ecommerce con coinvolgimento diretto nella gestione del marketplace Amazon (Vendor Central e/o Seller Central) - Forte comprensione delle operazioni di Amazon, solide capacità analitiche con capacità di interpretare dati e KPI - esperienza di lavoro con Excel per l'analisi dei dati - forte mentalità commerciale con capacità di negoziazione e gestione degli stakeholder - esperienza di lavoro con agenzie esterne e team interfunzionali - buone capacità organizzative e di gestione dei progetti - capacità di gestire più priorità in un ambiente frenetico - forti capacità di comunicazione e di gestione degli stakeholder - conoscenza fluente dell'inglese; Altre lingue sono un plus ## Benefici - Equilibrio tra lavoro e vita privata: Smart Working (modello di lavoro ibrido) e flessibilità oraria - Ambiente di lavoro internazionale, fresco e dinamico - Programmi di salute fisica e mentale, progetti sostenibili e workshop promossi dalla Guess Community - Eventi artistici, sportivi e sociali fuori dall'ufficio, grazie alle nostre attività Guess Fun! - Piattaforma e percorsi di formazione e sviluppo - Sconti sui nostri prodotti sia online che nei negozi
descriptionByLocale.de: Der Key Account & Marketplace Manager (Amazon und Nordamerika) treibt als Vendor (1P) und Marketplace Seller (3P) das profitable Markenwachstum auf Amazon voran und gestaltet gleichzeitig die Marktplatzstrategie in Nordamerika. Diese Rolle verwaltet die kommerzielle Leistung, unterstützt die Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung von Amazon und sorgt durch Koordination mit Amazon, Marketplace NA, Partnern und internen Teams für operative Exzellenz, Markenkonsistenz und nachhaltiges Wachstum. Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung und Geschäftsmanagement Amazon Vendor & Seller Operations Management Merchandising- und Marketingmanagement Reporting und Analysen Zusätzliche Verantwortlichkeiten Führen Sie zusätzliche Aufgaben und Projekte aus, die entsprechend den Geschäftsanforderungen zugewiesen werden. ## Anforderungen – Einschlägige Erfahrung von mehr als 7/8 Jahren in diesem Bereich – Frühere Erfahrung in E-Commerce-Positionen mit direkter Beteiligung an der Verwaltung des Amazon-Marktplatzes (Vendor Central und/oder Seller Central) – Ausgeprägtes Verständnis der Amazon-Abläufe, des Merchandising und der Leistungstreiber – Solide analytische Fähigkeiten mit der Fähigkeit, Daten und KPIs zu interpretieren – Fachkenntnisse im Umgang mit Excel für die Datenanalyse – Ausgeprägte kaufmännische Denkweise mit Verhandlungs- und Stakeholder-Management-Fähigkeiten – Erfahrung in der Arbeit mit externen Agenturen und funktionsübergreifenden Teams – Gute Organisations- und Projektmanagementfähigkeiten – Fähigkeit, mehrere Prioritäten zu verwalten ein schnelllebiges Umfeld – ausgeprägte Kommunikations- und Stakeholder-Managementfähigkeiten – fließend Englisch; zusätzliche Sprachen sind ein Plus ## Vorteile – Balance zwischen Arbeit und Privatleben: Intelligentes Arbeiten (hybrides Arbeitsmodell) und Zeitflexibilität – Ein internationales, frisches und dynamisches Arbeitsumfeld – Programme für körperliche und geistige Gesundheit, nachhaltige Projekte und Workshops, gefördert von Guess Community – Kunst, Sport und gesellschaftliche Veranstaltungen außerhalb des Büros, dank unserer Guess Fun-Aktivitäten! - Schulungs- und Entwicklungsplattform und -pfade - Rabatt auf unsere Produkte sowohl online als auch in Geschäften
descriptionByLocale.fr: Le responsable des comptes clés et du marché (Amazon et Amérique du Nord) stimule la croissance rentable de la marque sur Amazon en tant que fournisseur (1P) et vendeur du marché (3P), tout en façonnant la stratégie du marché en Amérique du Nord. Ce rôle gère les performances commerciales, prend en charge Amazon P&L et garantit l'excellence opérationnelle, la cohérence de la marque et une croissance soutenue grâce à la coordination avec Amazon, Marketplace NA, les partenaires et les équipes internes. Gestion du P&L et de l'entreprise Gestion des opérations des fournisseurs et vendeurs Amazon Gestion du merchandising et du marketing Reporting et analyses Responsabilités supplémentaires Effectuer des tâches et des projets supplémentaires assignés en fonction des besoins de l'entreprise. ## Exigences - Expérience pertinente de plus de 7/8 ans dans le domaine - Expérience antérieure dans des rôles de commerce électronique avec une implication directe dans la gestion du marché Amazon (Vendor Central et/ou Seller Central) - Forte compréhension des opérations, du merchandising et des moteurs de performance d'Amazon - Solides compétences analytiques avec capacité à interpréter les données et les KPI - Expertise de travail avec Excel pour l'analyse des données - Fort esprit commercial avec des compétences en négociation et en gestion des parties prenantes - Expérience de travail avec des agences externes et des équipes interfonctionnelles - Bonnes compétences organisationnelles et de gestion de projet - Capacité à gérer plusieurs priorités dans un environnement en évolution rapide - Solides compétences en communication et en gestion des parties prenantes - Anglais courant ; des langues supplémentaires sont un plus ## Avantages - Équilibre entre travail et vie personnelle : Travail intelligent (modèle de travail hybride) et flexibilité horaire - Un environnement de travail international, frais et dynamique - Programmes de santé physique et mentale, projets et ateliers durables promus par Guess Community - Arts, sports et événements sociaux en dehors du bureau, grâce à nos activités Guess Fun ! - Plateforme et parcours de formation et de développement - Remise sur nos produits en ligne et en magasin

requirements: Relevant experience of more than 7/8 years in the field
Previous experience in ecommerce roles with direct involvement in Amazon marketplace management (Vendor Central and/or Seller Central)
Strong understanding of Amazon operations, merchandising and performance drivers
Solid analytical skills with ability to interpret data and KPIs
Expertise working with Excel for Data Analysis
Strong commercial mindset with negotiation and stakeholder management skills
Experience working with external agencies and cross-functional teams
Good organizational and project management skills
Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment
Strong communication and stakeholder management skills
Fluent in English; additional languages are a plus

unchangedJobs.title: Product Developer Apparel
unchangedJobs.description:
Reporting directly to the PD Manager, the Product Developer will be responsible for Design, researching, developing and launching new products for the Apparel lines.

He/she will be responsible for product development and planning throughout the product lifecycle, including gathering and prioritizing product requirements, working closely with the buying department and ensuring that revenue and customer satisfaction goals are met.

He/she will also ensure that the product is aligned with the strategy and goals of the business.

CORE JOB RESPONSIBILITIES:

## Requirements
- At least 4 years of relevant work experience in the same role and field
- Strong ability with Adobe (photoshop and Illustrator)
- Strong knowledge of womenswear and menswear required, preferably Outlet division
- Must prove to have a clear understanding of the Guess Brand DNA
- Knowledge of and experience using conventional and unconventional fabrics and materials
- Familiarity with vendor management and negotiation
- Must have excellent organizational skills with attention to detail and follow-up
- Excellent interpersonal and communication skills with the ability to interact with a diverse group at all level
- Problem solving and negotiating skills
- Flexible in ever-changing, fast paced environment
- Deadline driven with a track record of delivering excellent results on time
- Extensive computer experience including but not limited to Microsoft: Excel, Word, Outlook, PowerPoint, Model Form, Enovia
- Fluent English. Any additional language is considered a plus
- Ability to travel to all countries within the designated regions as required

## Benefits
- An International, fresh and dynamic working environment
- Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Community
- Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities!
- Training & Development platform and paths
- Discount on our products both online and in stores

descriptionByLocale.it: Riportando direttamente al PD Manager, lo sviluppatore di prodotto sarà responsabile della progettazione, ricerca, sviluppo e lancio di nuovi prodotti per le linee di abbigliamento. He/she will be responsible for product development and planning throughout the product lifecycle, including gathering and prioritizing product requirements, working closely with the buying department and ensuring that revenue and customer satisfaction goals are met. Lui/lei garantirà inoltre che il prodotto sia allineato con la strategia e gli obiettivi dell'azienda. RESPONSABILITÀ LAVORATIVE PRINCIPALI: ## Requisiti - Almeno 4 anni di esperienza lavorativa rilevante nello stesso ruolo e campo - Forte abilità con Adobe (photoshop e Illustrator) - È richiesta una forte conoscenza dell'abbigliamento da donna e da uomo, preferibilmente la divisione Outlet - Deve dimostrare di avere una chiara comprensione del DNA del marchio Guess - Conoscenza ed esperienza nell'uso di tessuti e materiali convenzionali e non convenzionali - Familiarità con la gestione e la negoziazione dei fornitori - Deve avere eccellenti capacità organizzative con attenzione ai dettagli e al follow-up - Ottime relazioni interpersonali e di comunicazione skills with the ability to interact with a diverse group at all level - Problem solving and negotiating skills - Flexible in ever-changing, fast paced environment - Deadline driven with a track record of delivering excellent results on time - Extensive computer experience including but not limited to Microsoft: Excel, Word, Outlook, PowerPoint, Model Form, Enovia - Fluent English. Qualsiasi lingua aggiuntiva è considerata un vantaggio - Possibilità di viaggiare in tutti i paesi all'interno delle regioni designate come richiesto ## Vantaggi - Un ambiente di lavoro internazionale, fresco e dinamico - Programmi di salute fisica e mentale, progetti sostenibili e workshop promossi dalla Guess Community - Arti, sport ed eventi sociali fuori dall'ufficio, grazie alle nostre attività Guess Fun! - Piattaforma e percorsi di Formazione e Sviluppo - Sconti sui nostri prodotti sia online che nei negozi
descriptionByLocale.de: Der Produktentwickler berichtet direkt an den PD-Manager und ist für Design, Forschung, Entwicklung und Einführung neuer Produkte für die Bekleidungslinien verantwortlich. Er/sie ist für die Produktentwicklung und -planung während des gesamten Produktlebenszyklus verantwortlich, einschließlich der Erfassung und Priorisierung von Produktanforderungen, der engen Zusammenarbeit mit der Einkaufsabteilung und der Sicherstellung, dass Umsatz- und Kundenzufriedenheitsziele erreicht werden. He/she will also ensure that the product is aligned with the strategy and goals of the business. KERNSTELLENVERANTWORTLICHKEITEN: ## Anforderungen – Mindestens 4 Jahre einschlägige Berufserfahrung in der gleichen Rolle und im gleichen Bereich – Gute Kenntnisse im Umgang mit Adobe (Photoshop und Illustrator) – Gute Kenntnisse im Bereich Damen- und Herrenbekleidung erforderlich, vorzugsweise im Outlet-Bereich – Muss nachweisen, dass Sie ein klares Verständnis der Guess-Marken-DNA haben – Kenntnisse und Erfahrung im Umgang mit konventionellen und unkonventionellen Stoffen und Materialien – Vertrautheit mit Lieferantenmanagement und Verhandlungen – Muss über hervorragende organisatorische Fähigkeiten mit Liebe zum Detail und Nachverfolgung verfügen – Ausgezeichnet zwischenmenschliche und kommunikative Fähigkeiten mit der Fähigkeit, mit einer vielfältigen Gruppe auf allen Ebenen zu interagieren – Problemlösungs- und Verhandlungsgeschick – flexibel in sich ständig verändernden, schnelllebigen Umgebungen – terminorientiert und nachweislich termingerecht hervorragende Ergebnisse zu liefern – umfangreiche Computererfahrung, einschließlich, aber nicht beschränkt auf Microsoft: Excel, Word, Outlook, PowerPoint, Model Form, Enovia – fließendes Englisch. Jede zusätzliche Sprache gilt als Pluspunkt. - Möglichkeit, bei Bedarf in alle Länder innerhalb der ausgewiesenen Regionen zu reisen. ## Vorteile - Ein internationales, frisches und dynamisches Arbeitsumfeld - Programme für körperliche und geistige Gesundheit, nachhaltige Projekte und Workshops, die von der Guess Community gefördert werden - Kunst-, Sport- und gesellschaftliche Veranstaltungen außerhalb des Büros, dank unserer Guess Fun-Aktivitäten! - Schulungs- und Entwicklungsplattform und -pfade - Rabatt auf unsere Produkte sowohl online als auch in Geschäften
descriptionByLocale.fr: Relevant directement du gestionnaire PD, le développeur de produits sera responsable de la conception, de la recherche, du développement et du lancement de nouveaux produits pour les lignes de vêtements. Il/elle sera responsable du développement et de la planification des produits tout au long de leur cycle de vie, y compris la collecte et la priorisation des exigences des produits, la collaboration étroite avec le service des achats et la garantie que les objectifs de revenus et de satisfaction des clients sont atteints. Il/elle veillera également à ce que le produit soit aligné avec la stratégie et les objectifs de l'entreprise. RESPONSABILITÉS PRINCIPALES DU POSTE : ## Exigences - Au moins 4 ans d'expérience professionnelle pertinente dans le même rôle et le même domaine - Forte capacité avec Adobe (photoshop et Illustrator) - Solide connaissance des vêtements pour femmes et hommes requise, de préférence dans la division Outlet - Doit démontrer une compréhension claire de l'ADN de la marque Guess - Connaissance et expérience de l'utilisation de tissus et matériaux conventionnels et non conventionnels - Familiarité avec la gestion et la négociation des fournisseurs - Doit avoir d'excellentes compétences organisationnelles avec une attention aux détails et au suivi - Excellentes relations interpersonnelles et compétences en communication avec la capacité d'interagir avec un groupe diversifié à tous les niveaux - Compétences en résolution de problèmes et en négociation - Flexible dans un environnement en constante évolution et au rythme rapide - Respect des délais avec un historique de fourniture d'excellents résultats dans les délais - Vaste expérience informatique, y compris, mais sans s'y limiter, Microsoft : Excel, Word, Outlook, PowerPoint, Model Form, Enovia - Anglais courant. Toute langue supplémentaire est considérée comme un plus - Possibilité de voyager dans tous les pays des régions désignées selon les besoins ## Avantages - Un environnement de travail international, frais et dynamique - Programmes de santé physique et mentale, projets et ateliers durables promus par la communauté Guess - Arts, sports et événements sociaux en dehors du bureau, grâce à nos activités Guess Fun ! - Plateforme et parcours de formation et de développement - Remise sur nos produits en ligne et en magasin

unchangedJobs.title: Product Developer Jewellery
unchangedJobs.description:
The Product Developer Jewellery is responsible for the development and planning of products throughout their lifecycle, including gathering and prioritizing product requirements, working closely with Design, Sales and Marketing teams and ensuring revenue and customer satisfaction. The role will also ensure that the product supports the business’ overall strategy and goals.

CORE JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

ACTIVITIES

Product Development and Sourcing

Database and Style Creation

Vendor Monitoring

Interacting with other Guess departments

## Requirements
- Experience: years 3-5 of experience in a similar role in Jewellery field
- Education: University Degree
- Excellent knowledge of written and spoken English is mandatory. Any other European language is considered as a plus
- PC Skills: expert in Excel, strong experience in using planning and analytical systems, AS400 (Stealth)
- Proactively works toward set goals and has a problem solving mind-set
- Must possess the ability to handle multiple tasks/projects with adherence to deadlines
- Team player, dynamic personality, fast thinker, positive attitude and sense of urgency
- Open-minded and excellent interpersonal and communication skills with the ability to interact with a diverse group at all levels
- Availability to travel – including intercontinentally

## Benefits
- An International, fresh and dynamic working environment
- Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Community
- Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities!
- Training & Development platform and paths
- Discount on our products both online and in stores

descriptionByLocale.it: Lo sviluppatore del prodotto Jewellery è responsabile dello sviluppo e della pianificazione dei prodotti durante tutto il loro ciclo di vita, inclusa la raccolta e l'assegnazione delle priorità ai requisiti del prodotto, lavorando a stretto contatto con i team di progettazione, vendita e marketing e garantendo ricavi e soddisfazione del cliente. Il ruolo garantirà inoltre che il prodotto supporti la strategia e gli obiettivi generali dell'azienda. RESPONSABILITÀ LAVORATIVE PRINCIPALI ATTIVITÀ Sviluppo prodotto e approvvigionamento Database e creazione di stili Monitoraggio dei fornitori Interazione con altri dipartimenti di Guess ## Requisiti - Esperienza: anni 3-5 di esperienza in un ruolo simile nel campo della gioielleria - Istruzione: Laurea universitaria - Ottima conoscenza dell'inglese scritto e parlato è obbligatoria. Qualsiasi altra lingua europea è considerata un vantaggio - Competenze informatiche: esperto in Excel, forte esperienza nell'uso di sistemi di pianificazione e analitici, AS400 (Stealth) - Lavora in modo proattivo verso obiettivi prefissati e ha una mentalità di problem solving - Deve possedere la capacità di gestire più attività/progetti rispettando le scadenze - Giocatore di squadra, personalità dinamica, pensatore veloce, atteggiamento positivo e senso di urgenza - Mentalità aperta ed eccellenti capacità interpersonali e di comunicazione con la capacità di interagire con un gruppo eterogeneo a tutti i livelli - Disponibilità a viaggi, anche intercontinentali ## Vantaggi - Un ambiente di lavoro internazionale, fresco e dinamico - Programmi di salute fisica e mentale, progetti sostenibili e workshop promossi da Guess Community - Arti, sport ed eventi sociali fuori dall'ufficio, grazie alle nostre attività Guess Fun! - Piattaforma e percorsi di Formazione e Sviluppo - Sconti sui nostri prodotti sia online che nei negozi
descriptionByLocale.de: Der Produktentwickler Jewellery ist für die Entwicklung und Planung von Produkten während ihres gesamten Lebenszyklus verantwortlich, einschließlich der Erfassung und Priorisierung von Produktanforderungen, der engen Zusammenarbeit mit Design-, Vertriebs- und Marketingteams und der Sicherstellung von Umsatz und Kundenzufriedenheit. Die Rolle stellt außerdem sicher, dass das Produkt die Gesamtstrategie und -ziele des Unternehmens unterstützt. KERNJOBVERANTWORTLICHKEITEN TÄTIGKEITEN: Produktentwicklung und Beschaffung, Datenbank und Stilkreation, Lieferantenüberwachung, Interaktion mit anderen Guess-Abteilungen. ## Anforderungen – Erfahrung: 3–5 Jahre Erfahrung in einer ähnlichen Rolle im Schmuckbereich – Ausbildung: Hochschulabschluss – ausgezeichnete Englischkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift sind obligatorisch. Jede andere europäische Sprache wird als Pluspunkt angesehen - PC-Kenntnisse: Excel-Experte, umfassende Erfahrung im Umgang mit Planungs- und Analysesystemen, AS400 (Stealth) - Arbeitet proaktiv auf gesetzte Ziele hin und hat eine Denkweise zur Problemlösung - Muss über die Fähigkeit verfügen, mehrere Aufgaben/Projekte unter Einhaltung von Fristen zu bewältigen - Teamplayer, dynamische Persönlichkeit, schnelles Denken, positive Einstellung und Sinn für Dringlichkeit - Aufgeschlossene und ausgezeichnete zwischenmenschliche und kommunikative Fähigkeiten mit der Fähigkeit, mit einer vielfältigen Gruppe auf allen Ebenen zu interagieren - Reisebereitschaft – auch interkontinental ## Vorteile – Ein internationales, frisches und dynamisches Arbeitsumfeld – Programme für körperliche und geistige Gesundheit, nachhaltige Projekte und Workshops, die von der Guess Community gefördert werden – Kunst-, Sport- und gesellschaftliche Veranstaltungen außerhalb des Büros, dank unserer Guess Fun-Aktivitäten! - Schulungs- und Entwicklungsplattform und -pfade - Rabatt auf unsere Produkte sowohl online als auch in Geschäften
descriptionByLocale.fr: Le développeur de produits bijoux est responsable du développement et de la planification des produits tout au long de leur cycle de vie, y compris la collecte et la priorisation des exigences des produits, la collaboration étroite avec les équipes de conception, de vente et de marketing et la garantie des revenus et de la satisfaction des clients. Le rôle garantira également que le produit soutient la stratégie et les objectifs globaux de l’entreprise. CORE JOB RESPONSIBILITIES ACTIVITIES Product Development and Sourcing Database and Style Creation Vendor Monitoring Interacting with other Guess departments ## Requirements - Experience: years 3-5 of experience in a similar role in Jewellery field - Education: University Degree - Excellent knowledge of written and spoken English is mandatory. Any other European language is considered as a plus - PC Skills: expert in Excel, strong experience in using planning and analytical systems, AS400 (Stealth) - Proactively works toward set goals and has a problem solving mind-set - Must possess the ability to handle multiple tasks/projects with adherence to deadlines - Team player, dynamic personality, fast thinker, positive attitude and sense of urgency - Open-minded and excellent interpersonal and communication skills with the ability to interact with a diverse group at all levels - Disponibilité pour voyager – y compris intercontinental ## Avantages - Un environnement de travail international, frais et dynamique - Programmes de santé physique et mentale, projets et ateliers durables promus par Guess Community - Arts, sports et événements sociaux en dehors du bureau, grâce à nos activités Guess Fun ! - Plateforme et parcours de formation et de développement - Remise sur nos produits en ligne et en magasin

unchangedJobs.title: Retail HR Intern
unchangedJobs.description:
Support all HR processes at Guess Europe, division Retail Switzerland in all its core Human Resources activities with a main focus on administration tasks.

CORE JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

Support in many HR processes such as:

HR Administration

Time Management

Payroll

Employee Relations

Recruitment Support

## Requirements
- Bachelor’s degree or equivalent (preferably in Human Resources or Personnel Management)
- Any progressive work experience will be considered a plus
- Required fluency in English and knowledge of German
- Further knowledge of French is considered a plus
- Strong analytical skills; knowledge of MS-Office (in particular Excel), any additional operational system or graphic competence is a plus
- Open-minded towards a multicultural environment; trustworthy in handling confidential information
- Kind and professional approach when handling various requests
- Customer oriented, approachable, and strong interpersonal skills
- Strong written and verbal communication skills
- A good team player

## Benefits
- Balance between work and personal life: Smart Working (Hybrid work model) and Time flexibility
- An International, fresh and dynamic working environment
- Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Community
- Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities!
- Training & Development platform and paths
- Discount on our products both online and in stores

- Bachelor’s degree or equivalent (preferably in Human Resources or Personnel Management)
- Any progressive work experience will be considered a plus
- Required fluency in English and knowledge of German
- Further knowledge of French is considered a plus
- Strong analytical skills; knowledge of MS-Office (in particular Excel), any additional operational system or graphic competence is a plus
- Open-minded towards a multicultural environment; trustworthy in handling confidential information
- Kind and professional approach when handling various requests
- Customer oriented, approachable, and strong interpersonal skills
- Strong written and verbal communication skills
- A good team player

## Benefits
- Balance between work and personal life: Smart Working (Hybrid work model) and Time flexibility
- An International, fresh and dynamic working environment
- Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Community
- Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities!
- Training & Development platform and paths
- Discount on our products both online and in stores

unchangedJobs.title: Senior Product Developer Menswear (Fixed-term Contract)
unchangedJobs.description:
Reporting to the PD Director Guess & Marciano Man, the Senior PD Man, Outerwear & Beachwear is responsible for leading and managing the team of Apparel PD to research, develop, and launch new products for all Guess specific Lines.

The role will coordinate and supervise the product planning and execution throughout the product lifecycle, including: gathering and prioritizing product and customer requirements in line with the retail direction, defining the product vision as well as the market needs, working closely with design, sales, marketing, production, sourcing & buying departments and forecasting to ensure revenue and customer satisfaction goals are met. The PD Manager's job also includes ensuring that the product supports the company's overall strategy and goals.

CORE JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

## Requirements
- At least 6-7 years of relevant work experience in a similar role
- Knowledge of and experience using various fabrics and materials
- Familiarity with vendor management and negotiation
- Excellent organizational skills with attention to detail and follow-up
- Problem-solving and negotiating skills
- Flexible in a fast-paced, ever-changing environment
- Deadline-driven with a proven track record of timely results
- High level of self-management and flexibility
- Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook, PowerPoint), Adobe Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop), Enovia and Centric
- Fluent English; additional languages are a plus
- Ability to travel internationally within designated regions as needed

## Benefits
- An International, fresh and dynamic working environment
- Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Cares
- Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities!
- Training & Development platform and paths
- Discount on our products both online and in stores

descriptionByLocale.en:
Reporting to the PD Director Guess & Marciano Man, the Senior PD Man, Outerwear & Beachwear is responsible for leading and managing the team of Apparel PD to research, develop, and launch new products for all Guess specific Lines.

The role will coordinate and supervise the product planning and execution throughout the product lifecycle, including: gathering and prioritizing product and customer requirements in line with the retail direction, defining the product vision as well as the market needs, working closely with design, sales, marketing, production, sourcing & buying departments and forecasting to ensure revenue and customer satisfaction goals are met. The PD Manager's job also includes ensuring that the product supports the company's overall strategy and goals.

CORE JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

## Requirements
- At least 6-7 years of relevant work experience in a similar role
- Knowledge of and experience using various fabrics and materials

- Excellent organizational skills with attention to detail and follow-up

descriptionByLocale.it: Riportando al Direttore PD Guess & Marciano Man, il Senior PD Man, Outerwear & Beachwear è responsabile della guida e della gestione del team di Apparel PD per la ricerca, lo sviluppo e il lancio di nuovi prodotti per tutte le linee specifiche di Guess. Il ruolo coordinerà e supervisionerà la pianificazione e l'esecuzione del prodotto durante tutto il ciclo di vita del prodotto, tra cui: raccolta e definizione delle priorità dei requisiti del prodotto e del cliente in linea con la direzione della vendita al dettaglio, definizione della visione del prodotto e delle esigenze del mercato, lavoro a stretto contatto con i dipartimenti di progettazione, vendite, marketing, produzione, approvvigionamento e acquisto e previsioni per garantire il raggiungimento degli obiettivi di fatturato e soddisfazione del cliente. Il lavoro del PD Manager include anche garantire che il prodotto supporti la strategia e gli obiettivi generali dell'azienda. RESPONSABILITÀ LAVORATIVE PRINCIPALI ## Requisiti - Almeno 6-7 anni di esperienza lavorativa rilevante in un ruolo simile - Conoscenza ed esperienza nell'uso di vari tessuti e materiali - Familiarità con la gestione e la negoziazione dei fornitori - Eccellenti capacità organizzative con attenzione ai dettagli e al follow-up - Capacità di risoluzione dei problemi e di negoziazione - Flessibile in un ambiente frenetico e in continua evoluzione - Guidato dalle scadenze con una comprovata esperienza di risultati tempestivi - Elevato livello di autogestione e flessibilità - Competenza in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook, PowerPoint), Adobe Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop), Enovia e Centric - Inglese fluente; lingue aggiuntive sono un vantaggio - Possibilità di viaggiare a livello internazionale all'interno di regioni designate secondo necessità ## Vantaggi - Un ambiente di lavoro internazionale, fresco e dinamico - Programmi di salute fisica e mentale, progetti sostenibili e workshop promossi da Guess Cares - Arti, sport ed eventi sociali fuori dall'ufficio, grazie alle nostre attività Guess Fun! - Piattaforma e percorsi di Formazione e Sviluppo - Sconti sui nostri prodotti sia online che nei negozi
descriptionByLocale.de: Der Senior PD Man, Oberbekleidung & Beachwear berichtet an den PD-Direktor von Guess & Marciano Man und ist für die Leitung und Verwaltung des Teams von Apparel PD verantwortlich, um neue Produkte für alle Guess-spezifischen Linien zu erforschen, zu entwickeln und auf den Markt zu bringen. Die Rolle koordiniert und überwacht die Produktplanung und -ausführung während des gesamten Produktlebenszyklus, einschließlich: Sammeln und Priorisieren von Produkt- und Kundenanforderungen im Einklang mit der Einzelhandelsausrichtung, Definieren der Produktvision sowie der Marktbedürfnisse, enge Zusammenarbeit mit den Abteilungen Design, Vertrieb, Marketing, Produktion, Beschaffung und Einkauf sowie Prognosen, um sicherzustellen, dass Umsatz- und Kundenzufriedenheitsziele erreicht werden. Zu den Aufgaben des PD-Managers gehört es auch, dafür zu sorgen, dass das Produkt die Gesamtstrategie und -ziele des Unternehmens unterstützt. KERNSTELLENVERANTWORTLICHKEITEN ## Anforderungen - Mindestens 6-7 Jahre einschlägige Berufserfahrung in einer ähnlichen Rolle - Kenntnisse und Erfahrung im Umgang mit verschiedenen Stoffen und Materialien - Vertrautheit mit Lieferantenmanagement und Verhandlungen - Ausgezeichnete organisatorische Fähigkeiten mit Liebe zum Detail und Nachverfolgung - Problemlösungs- und Verhandlungsgeschick - Flexibel in einem schnelllebigen, sich ständig ändernden Umfeld - Terminorientiert mit nachweislicher Erfolgsbilanz bei zeitnahen Ergebnissen - Hohes Maß an Selbstmanagement und Flexibilität - Kenntnisse in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook, PowerPoint), Adobe Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop), Enovia und Centric – Fließendes Englisch; zusätzliche Sprachen sind ein Pluspunkt - Möglichkeit, bei Bedarf innerhalb bestimmter Regionen international zu reisen ## Vorteile - Ein internationales, frisches und dynamisches Arbeitsumfeld - Programme für körperliche und geistige Gesundheit, nachhaltige Projekte und Workshops, die von Guess Cares gefördert werden - Kunst-, Sport- und gesellschaftliche Veranstaltungen außerhalb des Büros, dank unserer Guess Fun-Aktivitäten! - Schulungs- und Entwicklungsplattform und -pfade - Rabatt auf unsere Produkte sowohl online als auch in Geschäften
descriptionByLocale.fr: Relevant du directeur PD Guess & Marciano Man, l'homme senior PD, vêtements d'extérieur et vêtements de plage est responsable de diriger et de gérer l'équipe de Apparel PD pour rechercher, développer et lancer de nouveaux produits pour toutes les lignes spécifiques de Guess. Le rôle consistera à coordonner et superviser la planification et l'exécution du produit tout au long de son cycle de vie, notamment : rassembler et hiérarchiser les exigences des produits et des clients conformément à l'orientation de la vente au détail, définir la vision du produit ainsi que les besoins du marché, travailler en étroite collaboration avec les services de conception, de vente, de marketing, de production, d'approvisionnement et d'achat et faire des prévisions pour garantir que les objectifs de revenus et de satisfaction des clients sont atteints. Le travail du responsable PD consiste également à s'assurer que le produit soutient la stratégie et les objectifs globaux de l'entreprise. RESPONSABILITÉS PRINCIPALES DU POSTE ## Exigences - Au moins 6 à 7 ans d'expérience professionnelle pertinente dans un rôle similaire - Connaissance et expérience de l'utilisation de divers tissus et matériaux - Familiarité avec la gestion et la négociation des fournisseurs - Excellentes compétences organisationnelles avec une attention aux détails et au suivi - Compétences en résolution de problèmes et en négociation - Flexible dans un environnement en évolution rapide et en constante évolution - Respect des délais avec un historique avéré de résultats dans les délais - Haut niveau d'autogestion et de flexibilité - Maîtrise de Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook, PowerPoint), Adobe Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop), Enovia et Centric - Anglais courant ; des langues supplémentaires sont un plus - Capacité à voyager à l'international dans des régions désignées selon les besoins ## Avantages - Un environnement de travail international, frais et dynamique - Programmes de santé physique et mentale, projets durables et ateliers promus par Guess Cares - Arts, sports et événements sociaux en dehors du bureau, grâce à nos activités Guess Fun ! - Plateforme et parcours de formation et de développement - Remise sur nos produits en ligne et en magasin
